description: Maps reasoning context types to tool sets from tool-catalog.json. The resolver picks the most specific matching context. 'ask' receives no tools (plain prompt). Extend by adding new context keys and referencing tool IDs from tool-catalog.json.

ask.description: Simple interactive question from a user. No workspace mutation needed.

task_session.description: A task assigned within a mission task-session. Full workspace read/write and shell access.

mission.description: Top-level mission orchestration context. Includes project/mission introspection tools.

research.description: Research and knowledge gathering context. Read-only access plus knowledge search.

analysis.description: Data analysis or code analysis. Read-only workspace access plus shell for running scripts.
